description: Hourly poll (Tier P0 — Compliance / 15 streams). Pulls baseline configuration from Defender XDR portal: antivirus policy, device control, web content filter, SmartScreen, tenant allow/block lists, custom detections, suppression rules, advanced/preview features, alert tuning, custom collection, PUA config, authenticated telemetry, live-response config, alert service config. Writes to MDE_AntivirusPolicy_CL, MDE_DeviceControlPolicy_CL, etc. (15 tables).
